sql_array: CREATE TABLE products (id INT, info JSON);
INSERT INTO products (id, info) VALUES (1, json '{"price":9, "name":"item1"}');
INSERT INTO products (id, info) VALUES (2, json '{"price":15, "name":"item2"}');
SELECT json.filter(info, '$..price') FROM products WHERE id = 1;
UPDATE products SET info = json.filter(info, '$..price') WHERE id = 2;
